name: Gai Paht Meht Mamuang Himapahn (Chicken Stir
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Chicken breast, boned and skinned, cut into half-inch pieces
1 small Onion, peeled and cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat wok over medium heat. Add oil.
2. Add chilies and stir fry for 1 minute until they blacken but do not burn. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Increase heat to medium-high. Add chicken and stir fry until cooked through, about 2 minutes.
4. Add onion and stir fry for 1 minute.
5. Add fish sauce, soy sauce, and sugar. Continue frying for 1 minute.
6. Add cashews and reserved chilies. Stir well.
7. Transfer to a platter and serve hot or warm.
